description: Send a message to a Slack channel or thread using the Slack Web API.

inputs.name: channel
inputs.description: Slack channel ID or name (e.g. C1234567890 or #general)

inputs.name: thread_ts
inputs.description: Timestamp of parent message to reply in thread

outputs.name: ts
outputs.description: Message timestamp (can be used for threading)

outputs.name: channel
outputs.description: Channel the message was posted to
